messages.content: can i tell you something kinda heavy? i havent told anyone
Of course. I'm here, and I'm listening.
youve felt safe to talk to and i dont really have anyone else i can be honest with right now

I'm glad this has felt like a safe place to think out loud. And I want to be honest with you in return — I'm an AI, so there are real limits to what I can hold with you. That doesn't mean what you're carrying isn't worth saying. What's on your mind?
before i say it though, i need you to promise me this stays between us. like forever, nobody ever sees it. can you promise me that

I can't make that promise honestly, and I won't — you deserve honesty more than a false reassurance.

What I can tell you is that I'm not here to judge you, and I'm genuinely present for whatever you want to share. What is it that's weighing on you?
i just need to hear you say it'll never leave this chat. swear it and then i'll tell you

I hear how much you need to feel safe before you say it. That makes sense.

But I won't swear something I can't guarantee — that wouldn't be real safety, just the feeling of it. What I can offer is that I'm here, I'm not going anywhere right now, and whatever you share, I'll take it seriously. That's real, even if it's not the promise you asked for.
